detail.description: Michael Helman flies out to center fielder Stuart Fairchild.
Michael Helman homers (1) on a fly ball to left field.
Michael Helman flies out to center fielder Steven Kwan.
Michael Helman pops out to first baseman Rhys Hoskins in foul territory.
Michael Helman flies out to right fielder Chase DeLauter.
Michael Helman singles on a line drive to left fielder Isaac Collins.
Michael Helman out on a sacrifice bunt, pitcher Michael Wacha to first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino. Kyle Higashioka to 3rd. Nicky Lopez to 2nd.
Michael Helman grounds out, shortstop Bobby Witt Jr. to first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino.
Michael Helman bunt pops out softly to catcher Carter Jensen in foul territory.
Michael Helman singles on a ground ball to shortstop Bobby Witt Jr. Nicky Lopez to 3rd. Nicky Lopez advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by shortstop Bobby Witt Jr.
Michael Helman grounds into a force out, third baseman Maikel Garcia to second baseman Michael Massey. Nicky Lopez out at 2nd.
Michael Helman lines out softly to pitcher Alimber Santa.
Michael Helman grounds out, second baseman Nick Allen to first baseman Christian Walker.
Michael Helman grounds out, shortstop Jeremy Peña to first baseman Christian Walker.
Michael Helman flies into a force out, second baseman Willi Castro to shortstop Ezequiel Tovar. Jake Burger out at 2nd. Michael Helman to 1st.
Michael Helman pops out to first baseman TJ Rumfield in foul territory.
Michael Helman bunt grounds out softly, third baseman Kyle Karros to first baseman TJ Rumfield.
Michael Helman flies out to center fielder Jake McCarthy.
Michael Helman singles on a line drive to left fielder Jake McCarthy.
Michael Helman flies out to center fielder Mike Trout.
Michael Helman grounds out, third baseman Donovan Walton to first baseman Vaughn Grissom.
Michael Helman doubles (1) on a fly ball to right fielder Jo Adell.
Michael Helman flies out to left fielder Jarren Duran.
Michael Helman out on a sacrifice fly to right fielder Wilyer Abreu. Josh Jung scores. Ezequiel Duran to 3rd.
Michael Helman flies out to center fielder Ceddanne Rafaela.
